name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi backend v4.83 — hardening fixes: API layer now degrades gracefully on non-JSON responses (Railway cold-start after redeploy no longer crashes revenue/performance/sold-out widgets with the cryptic Safari error); timeAgo + sold-out date parsing made Safari-safe; dashboard top stats now 2x2 on mobile too.
